acceptance_criteria: A decision artifact states whether GitHub issues, PR comments, local handoff tasks/ledger rows, or a combination own repair-ticket visibility for v1.
If GitHub comments/issues are used, the schema, permissions, idempotency key, update policy, and close/supersede behavior are defined.
If GitHub comments/issues are rejected for v1, the decision explains why and identifies any future trigger for adoption.
The decision preserves one canonical state owner and prevents agents from maintaining divergent queue state in local files and GitHub.
objective: Decide: Resolve the `.idea` open question of whether PR repair tickets should be projected to GitHub issues/comments, local ledger rows, or both, without creating competing sources of truth.

source_gap_audit.reason: Deep .idea revisit found v3 open ticket-placement question had no dedicated task.

title: [architect] Decide GitHub issue/comment ticket projection boundaries
